questionHtml: Estimate the median number of bacterial cells per gram of feces in the R enterotype.
markschemeHtml:
1.9 × 1011 / 190000 million / 190 billion (cells per gram);

Cells per gram not needed as in stem. Accept 1.80 × 1011 to 1.95 × 1011.

meta.title: Estimate the median number of bacterial cells per gram of feces in the R enterotype.
breadcrumbLabels: C3.2.1. Pathogens as the cause of infectious diseases
